steps.action: Inspect traceability assertion contract and implementation test in InventoryBatchTraceabilityServiceTest
steps.expected: Batch traceability includes batch number, mfg/expiry, cost, quantity, and movement chain
steps.observed: Test constructs finished-good and raw-material batches with batchCode, manufacturedAt, expiryDate, quantity, unitCost/costPerUnit and verifies movement history via getBatchMovementHistory

steps.action: Run targeted test command: mvn -f erp-domain/pom.xml --settings erp-domain/.mvn/settings.xml test -Djacoco.skip=true -Dtest=InventoryBatchTraceabilityServiceTest
steps.observed: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 2, Failures: 0, Errors: 0

steps.action: Review production and wastage regression/unit evidence
steps.expected: Raw material consumption links to production output with full cost trail and wastage recording
steps.observed: ProductionLogWipPostingRegressionIT verifies material usage + labor/overhead rolled into total cost with WIP debit/credit parity; ProductionLogListDetailLazyLoadRegressionIT asserts output linkage and wastage reason PROCESS_LOSS; PackingServiceTest verifies wastage journal posting

steps.action: Run targeted tests with schema compatibility override for integration context
Inspect stock movement + low stock threshold assertion in FinishedGoodsServiceTest
steps.expected: Movements remain accurate across receipt/reserve/release/dispatch and low-stock alerts trigger by threshold
steps.observed: stockAccuracyAcrossMovements_andPerProductLowStockThreshold validates final stock (16 current, 0 reserved), movement types include RECEIPT/RESERVE/RELEASE/DISPATCH, and low-stock behavior changes with threshold

steps.action: Run targeted test command with schema compatibility override
steps.observed: BUILD SUCCESS; FinishedGoodsServiceTest selected method passed

steps.action: Review frontend-handoff Product Catalog & Inventory section
steps.expected: Section includes endpoint map, flows, state machines, error codes, and data contracts for catalog/inventory
steps.observed: Section contains catalog endpoint map, inventory/batch/adjustment/dispatch endpoint maps, dispatch flow, state machines, catalog+inventory error code table, and DTO contracts including traceability + adjustment payloads

commands: Grep Product Catalog & Inventory headings and required subsections
outputs: frontend-handoff section found at line ~1085 with required subsections populated

frictions.description: Runtime API at http://localhost:8081 was unavailable (curl connection failure), so validation used assigned API-flow fallback: targeted integration/unit tests + source/contract evidence.
frictions.resolution: Executed assertion-scoped Maven tests and extracted surefire outputs and code references.

frictions.description: Running multiple integration assertions in one Maven invocation caused context bootstrap failure due missing column state_code during CriticalFixtureInitializer startup.
frictions.resolution: Ran integration assertions in isolated commands with -Dspring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=update as documented in user-testing guidance.

summary: Validated 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Evidence captured from targeted test executions and catalog/inventory handoff source verification; localhost runtime surface was unavailable so API-flow fallback path was used.
